name: hd2d-backend
description: HD2D Hardcore Door to Door Closers - Backend API

scripts.secret:openai:prod: wrangler secret put OPENAI_API_KEY --config wrangler.toml --env production --from-env OPENAI_API_KEY
scripts.secret:eagleview:prod: wrangler secret put EAGLEVIEW_CLIENT_ID --config wrangler.toml --env production && wrangler secret put EAGLEVIEW_CLIENT_SECRET --config wrangler.toml --env production
